name: email-notification-worker
description: Queue-driven email notification worker. HTTP producer + queue consumer sending via nodemailer SMTP with DKIM signing.

scripts.setup:queues: npx wrangler queues create email-notifications && npx wrangler queues create email-notifications-dlq
scripts.setup:kv: npx wrangler kv namespace create IDEMPOTENCY
scripts.setup:d1:migrate: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply email_deliveries --remote
scripts.setup:secrets-store: npx wrangler secrets-store store create email-worker-secrets

API_BEARER_TOKEN.description: Bearer token for POST /send requests. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

SMTP_HOST.description: SMTP server hostname (e.g. email-smtp.us-east-1.amazonaws.com, smtp.resend.com, smtp.sendgrid.net).

SMTP_PORT.description: SMTP port. 587 for STARTTLS (most providers) or 465 for implicit TLS.

SMTP_USER.description: SMTP username. Provider-specific (SES IAM SMTP user, 'apikey' for SendGrid, 'resend' for Resend).

SMTP_PASS.description: SMTP password / API key. Obtain from your provider's dashboard.

DKIM_PRIVATE_KEY.description: PEM-encoded RSA private key used by nodemailer to sign outbound messages. Generate with: npm run generate:dkim

DKIM_SELECTOR.description: DKIM selector that appears in the DNS record name (e.g. 's1'). Must match <selector>._domainkey.<DKIM_DOMAIN> TXT record.

DKIM_DOMAIN.description: Sending domain (e.g. mail.example.com). Used as the d= tag in the DKIM signature.
